title: NYC Has a Sewer Mystery: Strangers Keep Climbing Into the Manholes
script: Security cameras across Manhattan have caught dozens of strangers lifting manhole covers and disappearing into New York City sewers. The footage spans 6 different boroughs and several months. NYPD says no group has claimed it. The Department of Environmental Protection found nothing missing, no damage, no graffiti. Some clips show people staying down there for over an hour. A few are wearing matching jackets. It might be a urban explorer club. It might be something stranger. Nobody knows yet.
